caption: A man wearing a tall, grey, pointed wig, glasses, a white button-down shirt with tan suspenders, and a red bow tie sits in a studio. He wears black over-ear headphones and is positioned in front of a professional black microphone. Behind him is a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and various clothing items on hangers. A logo on the left side of the screen reads "GOSS TALK JOY PODCAST," and a similar red and white logo on the right reads "GOSS TALK JOY." As the sequence progresses, the man maintains a steady position, though his facial expression shifts slightly as he speaks, with his mouth opening and closing. The background, equipment, and clothing remain constant throughout the scene.
